declarations.name: announce
declarations.description: Announce `message` to assistive tech via the shared live region.

declarations.name: resetAnnouncer
declarations.description: Remove the mounted live regions (handy for tests / teardown).

members.name: componentName
members.description: The pattern's common name in kebab-case, e.g. "button". Set per subclass.

members.name: variantConfigs
members.description: Variant configs registered for this component (its ./variants module).

members.name: warnings
members.description:
Dev diagnostics switch. Warnings name the fix (see GRAMMAR.md §9); silence
them wholesale in production builds if desired.

members.name: variant
members.description: Space-separated registered variant names, e.g. "ghost lg". Unknown names warn with the registered vocabulary.

members.name: componentClasses
members.description:
`zbk-{component}` plus one `zbk-{component}--{name}` per applied variant.
Subclass templates bind this to the skeleton's root native element.

members.name: uidFor
members.description: Generate a document-unique id for internal ARIA relationships.

members.name: appliedVariants
members.description: The registered VariantConfigs matching the `variant` attribute, in order.

members.name: validateVariants
members.description: Validate the `variant` attribute; every warning names the fix.

members.name: nativeElement
members.description:
The internal native element that carries the pattern's semantics (the
`<button>` inside `<zbk-button>`). ARIA relocates here; focus forwards here.

members.name: focusTarget
members.description: Override when the focus target differs from the ARIA target.

members.name: relocateAria
members.description:
Move `aria-*` and `role` from the host to the internal native element.
The host stays role-generic; AT reads the native element.

members.name: captureChildren
members.description:
Capture authored children before Lit's first render so the component can
place them inside the skeleton it renders. Named positions use the `slot`
attribute; everything else is default content.

members.name: slotted
members.description: Authored content for a named slot (or the default content when omitted).

members.name: hasSlotted
members.description: True when the author supplied content for the given position.

members.name: warn
members.description: `[zbk-button] <message>` — every message names the fix (GRAMMAR.md §9).

members.name: hasAccessibleName
members.description:
Rough accessible-name computation for the dev-mode nameless-control check:
visible text, aria-label, or aria-labelledby on the native element.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: Space-separated registered variant names, e.g. "ghost lg". Unknown names warn with the registered vocabulary.

declarations.description:
The zebkit button: a light-DOM element wrapping a real `<button>`. Renders
the token-driven skeleton, reflects `variant` into classes, forwards native
semantics, and adds the one behavior a native button lacks (`loading`).
No custom events — the native `click` bubbles, and keyboard activation
(Enter/Space) arrives as a click.
declarations.name: ZbkButton

slots.description: The button's label content (its accessible name).
A supplementary pictogram, rendered aria-hidden beside the label.
slots.name: icon

members.name: componentName
members.description: The pattern's common name in kebab-case, e.g. "button". Set per subclass.

members.name: variantConfigs
members.description: Variant configs registered for this component (its ./variants module).

members.name: type
members.description:
Forwarded to the internal button. Defaults to "button" — the platform's
"submit" default is a well-known footgun inside forms.

members.name: disabled
members.description: Native disabled: removed from the tab order, blocks all interaction.

members.name: loading
members.description:
Busy state (`aria-busy`): announces in-flight work, suppresses activation,
and — unlike `disabled` — keeps the button focusable so keyboard and
screen-reader users don't lose their place mid-operation.

members.name: name
members.description: Forwarded to the internal button for native form participation.

members.name: nativeElement
members.description:
The internal native element that carries the pattern's semantics (the
`<button>` inside `<zbk-button>`). ARIA relocates here; focus forwards here.

members.name: handleClick
members.description:
While loading, activation is suppressed before anything else can see it
(form submission, consumer listeners). Keyboard activation (Enter/Space)
arrives as a click on a native button, so this covers every input.

members.name: warnings
members.description:
Dev diagnostics switch. Warnings name the fix (see GRAMMAR.md §9); silence
them wholesale in production builds if desired.

members.name: variant
members.description: Space-separated registered variant names, e.g. "ghost lg". Unknown names warn with the registered vocabulary.

members.name: componentClasses
members.description:
`zbk-{component}` plus one `zbk-{component}--{name}` per applied variant.
Subclass templates bind this to the skeleton's root native element.

members.description: Generate a document-unique id for internal ARIA relationships.

members.name: appliedVariants
members.description: The registered VariantConfigs matching the `variant` attribute, in order.

members.name: validateVariants
members.description: Validate the `variant` attribute; every warning names the fix.

members.description: Override when the focus target differs from the ARIA target.

declarations.description:
The zebkit checkbox: a light-DOM element wrapping a real
`<input type="checkbox">` inside its own `<label>`. The invisible native
input stretches across the whole label (hover, press, click, and focus land
on it natively anywhere); an aria-hidden control span visualizes its state.
No custom events — the native `change`/`input` bubble.
declarations.name: ZbkCheckbox

slots.description: The label content (the accessible name via the wrapping label).
Indicator content shown while checked; replaces the drawn checkmark. Presentational (the control is aria-hidden).
slots.name: checked

slots.description: Indicator content shown while neither checked nor indeterminate.
slots.name: unchecked

slots.description: Indicator content shown while indeterminate; replaces the drawn bar.
slots.name: indeterminate

members.name: componentName
members.description: The pattern's common name in kebab-case, e.g. "button". Set per subclass.

members.name: variantConfigs
members.description: Variant configs registered for this component (its ./variants module).

members.name: checked
members.description: Whether the checkbox is checked. Syncs from user interaction.

members.name: indeterminate
members.description:
The mixed "some but not all" state. Visual + AT state only, never
submitted; any user toggle clears it (native behavior).

members.name: disabled
members.description: Native disabled: removed from the tab order, blocks all interaction.

members.name: required
members.description: Forwarded for native constraint validation.

members.name: name
members.description: Forwarded to the internal input for native form participation.

members.name: value
members.description: The submitted value; defaults to the platform's "on".

members.name: nativeElement
members.description:
The internal native element that carries the pattern's semantics (the
`<button>` inside `<zbk-button>`). ARIA relocates here; focus forwards here.

members.name: controlClasses
members.description:
A `--slotted-{state}` modifier per authored indicator lets the stylesheet
retire the drawn pseudo the slotted content replaces.

members.name: handleChange
members.description: Keep element state mirroring the native input (the source of truth).

members.name: hasAccessibleName
members.description: The wrapping label names the control; check adopted content too.

them wholesale in production builds if desired.

declarations.name: defineZebkitComponents
declarations.description: Register every zebkit component (each define is idempotent).

The zebkit radio: a light-DOM element wrapping a real
`<input type="radio">` inside its own `<label>`. Radios sharing a `name`
form a native group — mutual exclusion, arrow-key navigation, and form
submission come from the platform. No custom events — the native `change`
bubbles from the newly selected input.
declarations.name: ZbkRadio

slots.description: The label content (the accessible name via the wrapping label).
Indicator content shown while selected; replaces the drawn dot. Presentational (the control is aria-hidden).
slots.name: checked

slots.description: Indicator content shown while not selected.
slots.name: unchecked

members.name: componentName
members.description: The pattern's common name in kebab-case, e.g. "button". Set per subclass.

members.name: variantConfigs
members.description: Variant configs registered for this component (its ./variants module).

members.name: checked
members.description: Whether this radio is the group's selection. Syncs from user interaction.

members.name: disabled
members.description: Native disabled: removed from the tab order, blocks all interaction.

members.name: required
members.description: Forwarded for native constraint validation.

members.name: name
members.description: The group key. Radios only behave as one group when they share a name.

members.name: value
members.description: This option's submitted value; defaults to the platform's "on".

members.name: nativeElement
members.description:
The internal native element that carries the pattern's semantics (the
`<button>` inside `<zbk-button>`). ARIA relocates here; focus forwards here.

members.name: controlClasses
members.description:
A `--slotted-{state}` modifier per authored indicator lets the stylesheet
retire the drawn dot the slotted content replaces.

members.name: handleChange
members.description:
The platform already unchecked the rest of the group; it just doesn't
fire events on them. Mirror the native state back onto every zbk-radio
sharing this group so their `checked` properties stay truthful.

members.name: syncFromNative
members.description: Re-read `checked` from the native input (the source of truth).

members.name: hasAccessibleName
members.description: The wrapping label names the control; check adopted content too.

members.name: warnings
members.description:
Dev diagnostics switch. Warnings name the fix (see GRAMMAR.md §9); silence
them wholesale in production builds if desired.

Subclass templates bind this to the skeleton's root native element.

declarations.description:
The zebkit toggle (switch): a light-DOM element wrapping a real
`<input type="checkbox" role="switch">` inside its own `<label>` — the APG
switch pattern on a fully native input. A track with a traveling thumb that
announces on/off; deliberately separate from `<zbk-checkbox>` so each
carries an intentional token surface. No custom events — the native
`change`/`input` bubble.
declarations.name: ZbkToggle

slots.description: The label content (the accessible name via the wrapping label).

declarations.description:
The zebkit tooltip/toggletip: a light-DOM element that adopts its child as
the trigger and renders a positioned bubble beside it. `mode="hint"` (the
default) describes the trigger on hover/focus per WCAG 1.4.13 (hoverable,
dismissible, persistent); `mode="toggle"` turns click-triggered toggletip
behavior on, announcing content through the shared live region. Positioning
uses floating-ui with `popover="manual"` top-layer promotion where
supported. No custom events.
declarations.name: ZbkTooltip

slots.description: The trigger element the tooltip describes (a focusable control).

members.name: componentName
members.description: The pattern's common name in kebab-case, e.g. "button". Set per subclass.

members.name: content
members.description:
The tooltip text. Plain text only — supplementary description flattens to
a string for AT anyway; interactive content is a different pattern.

members.name: mode
members.description: Trigger semantics: "hint" (hover/focus) or "toggle" (click).

members.name: placement
members.description:
Preferred side, floating-ui vocabulary: top | right | bottom | left
(optionally `-start` / `-end`). Flips automatically when it can't fit.

members.name: dismissed
members.description: Escape was pressed; stays shut until hover/focus fully resets.

members.name: nativeElement
members.description: The trigger: the first authored element child.

members.name: variantConfigs
members.description: Variant configs registered for this component (its ./variants module).

members.name: warnings
members.description:
Dev diagnostics switch. Warnings name the fix (see GRAMMAR.md §9); silence
them wholesale in production builds if desired.

members.description: Space-separated registered variant names, e.g. "ghost lg". Unknown names warn with the registered vocabulary.
